about.intro1: After an initial career in energy engineering and R&D, I moved into web development, growing from a junior role to confirmed-level responsibilities on fullstack technical topics ranging from database structure to design system component creation. Through these experiences, I developed a strong preference for best practices such as SOLID principles and test-first development.
